judgment.summary: Profitable, high-growth alternative asset manager with strong returns and a solid analyst consensus, though dividend payout is stretched.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last quarter beat consensus EPS by 1.7%; next earnings date is 2026-07-23.
positives: Forward P/E 15.50x — attractive relative to trailing P/E of 29.96x and analyst growth estimates.
Operating margin 38.0% and Profit margin 21.2% — indicative of strong operational efficiency.
Return on equity 29.5% and Return on assets 13.0% — demonstrate effective use of capital.
Analyst consensus is 'buy' with a mean target of $143.55, suggesting significant upside potential.
Dividend yield of 4.3% offers income to shareholders.
negatives: Dividend payout ratio of 121.5% is unsustainable and may indicate future cuts.
Debt/Equity ratio of 72.02 suggests significant leverage.
Current ratio and Quick ratio below 1.00 indicate potential short-term liquidity concerns.
Revenue and Earnings growth YoY are modest at 5.7% and 3.9% respectively, though quarterly earnings growth is stronger.

news.paragraph: Blackstone Inc. recently received an analyst report from Morningstar Research, providing an updated perspective on the company. While the report itself doesn't contain immediate catalysts, it comes as the company is set to report its next earnings on July 23rd. Investors will be looking for continued strong performance and management's outlook.
